x="180" y="560" width="300" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LadjJh0SSRlLmkwfqYPK-48" value="<h1 style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px;"><font>GUI Layer</font></h1><p>Strictly Provides wrappers required to use core with other languages/platform:
- core-wasm for WebAssembly
- core-jni for Java/Kotlin

Access stored data (thread lists, configuration, user created files)
- From the filesystem for the desktop application
- From a database for the web (and android) application
